docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF JUL-11-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUJISAKA, KENNETH $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.00, PLUS COSTS OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATSUMATA, ATSUSHI AS TO DEFENDANT FUJISAKA, KENNETH SUMMONS ISSUED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATSUMATA, ATSUSHI AS TO DEFENDANT FUJISAKA, KENNETH
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATSUMATA, ATSUSHI HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
ORDER BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY- CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATSUMATA, ATSUSHI SERVED JUN-20-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUJISAKA, KENNETH
